description: Review Strapi artifacts (Personas, Writing Guidelines, Company Contacts). Focus on developer audience, SEO tags, image requirements, scannable content, brief CTAs/intros, word count (~800), CTA variations per funnel stage.
Check previous Strapi articles. Analyze structure, content style, CTA usage, internal linking. Compare with Timmy's approach (e.g., no intro for PSEOs, meta title placement, text block sizing).
